Some Bad News..... some very bad news...
2003'2'9 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, after a huge accomplishment on DBGT of having full working episodes and movies, things couldn't be better. And this was all thanks to JamJar and his server. Unfortunately, last night, his house was broken into, and many things were stolen, among them, his hardrive which was were the episodes and movies were being download from. Thus, making our media unstable once again.

This is very bad news, since this was the one time we had a secure media connection. And it got fucked up, its way too ironic. So this may cause some more problems in terms of media. But oh well things happen. The worse thing is that JamJar will not be able to update DBGT and bring back the media for a long time, since the family is going through the crisis of being robbed. So we're very sorry about that, and we apologize for any inconvienience.

The only other thing I have to say is that we got the Anime News Section coming very soon. Either today or tommarow, so look forward to that. Plus lots of DBGT Ep Summaries, more Fan Fictions, and much more! Plus if any of you have fan art to submit, please send it to me at majingohan@dbgt.com with your name, title of pic, comments for the pic, and website url (if you have one). Anyways, thats it for now / MG Out...

Up To Speed!
2003'2'9 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, things seem to be running great here at DBGT. And because of the demand of Anime News wanted, I've decided to make a separate section for it, rather than post it along with site update posts. I wish to keep them separate, to cause less confusion. I'll probably get that section up tommarow with the help of Draton. Which reminds me, that if you guys havn't visited Draton's new site, do so. Tokyo Revolution, its an awesome anime site that has gotten off to a great start and will do lots of good in this community. So take a look and visit Tokyo Revolution.

Also if you still havn't checked out our media, I suggest you do so, since this is one of the rare times that we have a stable grasp on the media here at DBGT. We have Full DBZ Episodes and Full DBZ Movies for your viewing pleasure, so make sure to check those out / MG Out...

*Full DBZ Episodes!

*Full DBZ Movies!

First Update
2003'2'9 ++ posted by Kevin Phoenix
Hello folks. I'm still settling in so please bear with me both fellow staff members and site visitors. I got started on what will be a series of major updates and additions to the DBZ Movie List. Each movie listing will have a link to a detailed synopsis and review that will provide in-depth detail on what the movie is all about. I may also look into getting screencaps made for it as well. The first movie to be featured will be movie 2, The World's Strongest. Whenever MG posts the updates, I'll let you know.

Tokyo-Revolution.com Opens!!!
2003'2'8 ++ posted by Draton
Hey everyone! I have some excellent news. Well one of the reasons I was so pre-occupied was because I was helping getting this site open called Tokyo-Revolution.com. It was founded by me and my very good friend named Hank over at DBZ Circuit. We have been working very hard on this site, so please check it out. We carry some of the best darn anime reviews there is. So go check us out!! Tokyo-Revolution.com.

Media Stable!!!
2003'2'8 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, thanks to the tremendous help and dedication of jamjar, we now have all 13 DBZ Movies up plus TONS of Full DBZ Episodes including the new ones! Hopefully this will allow us to have a stable grasp on the media without it going down! And if we can keep it up for 2 weeks + it will then be a great accomplishment.

Anyways, so now enjoy all the Full Episodes and Full Movies that we have up while you can. Becuase you never know when they might go down, especially on DBGT. So Enjoy! And a small note to staff, don't post over this until I give permission. / MG Out...

*FULL DBZ EPISODES!

*FULL DBZ MOVIES!

40 FULL EPISODES!!!!!!
2003'2'8 ++ posted by JamJar
I have now put up the first of the episodes for download on the image gallery, I will also ask majingohan to put a link on the multimedia section. You can get to these episodes by visiting the multimedia gallery, and selecting Dragonballz from the episode download list on the side menu. I will hopefully be able to add some dbgt and dragonball episodes soon, maybe at the end of this month.

I would also like to say two people who have been having problems with movie downloads, that the problems will not persist, as yestarday night I was doing some tests on the server, they are over, and it's now working.

*40 FULL EPISODES FOR DOWNLOAD

FULL MOVIES UP!!!!!
2003'2'7 ++ posted by JamJar
Hey, people, i'm extremely sorry that I havn't posted for a long time, but I have been extremely busy with school work and various other things. I have spent alot of time setting up the a media server so dbgt.com can provide you with full episodes and movies. After alotof networking trouble, I have finally managed to set it up, and it's now fully operational. To download these movies; all you need to do is go to the gallery and select a movie from the dropdown list, and a download page will appear in a new window, follow the steps there and you can download movies. For the movies, I have decided not to lock them behind voting doors, as dbgt.com is one of the only websites with fully operational movies, and it will seem less unique if you have to go through alot of drag to get to them. I will ask MG to put a link up in the multimedia section, or you can just go to the gallery, and select the movie you wish to download. ALSO I WILL HAVE SOME FULL EPISODE UP PRETTY SOON, IT WILL START WITH 30!!!

*FULL MOVIE DOWNLOADS

Full Episodes Working Once Again!!!
2003'2'7 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, yes your getting tired of hearing it. But the eps are up once again. So rush over and download them, because they most likely will be going down very soon again. So if you don't get'em fast, they may be gone. For now the only eps I have up are 267-272. Those are working! So go to the multimedia section, and then to the DBZ Ep section, and download away!

Thats it for now / Lots more to come soon / enjoy the site / MG Out...

*DOWNLOAD FULL DBZ EPISODES

More Free Banners and Buttons!
2003'2'7 ++ posted by Draton
Hey everyone. Once again, I have not updated in ages because of school work. I will try my best to get back on track with DBGT since I kind of have some free time now. Anyways, here's what I've put up in the latest. Sinister sent me 4 new free buttons and 2 new free banners. Be sure to go check those out in the miscellaneous section.

Free Buttons
Free Banners

Anyways, I'll be getting some more content up in the next few days. Probably some humor, and that one tutorial I've been slacking on. I'd also like to welcome our newest staff member Kevin Phoenix, who seems to have a lot of experience. Phoenix, whenever you're online and have time, AIM me at the screen name DratonXL please. That's my update for now. Draton, signing out...

Update and some DBZ Gaming News.
2003'2'7 ++ posted by SMGoten2
Well, my episode summaries will be up and running this weekend, and I will have alot of them ready also.

In other news, Dragonball Z: Budokai, has been announced for the Cube', Heres the whole story:


"Infogrames will be bringing Dragon Ball Z: Budokai to the GameCube in the US...

Infogrames has announced that they will release a GameCube version of Dragon Ball Z: Budokai in the US. The game has been scheduled for an August 26th release. The game has already been released for the PlayStation 2, but now GameCube owners who are fans of the series will also get to enjoy the anime-inspired game."


All News from GamerFeed.

SITE INFORMATION

Website Bio:.
Site Layout Revision: 10/19/02

Webmaster: Majin Gohan
Founded By: Ruben Rodas
Site Statistics:
Live Stats: 20 users online

NEWS TICKER
Site News: Site upgrades are currently being processed, and can be viewable as progressions are made. Image Gallery is now undergoing constructions, and image additions are being made. Multimedia is on its way, and new information and game reviews are being processed as well.
DB News: PS2 video game information is being scattered among DBZ web sites, and an official trailer has been released. New DBZ series episodes are being aired. More information is soon to come.
Majin Gohan is literally working all the time for you, the DBGT fans. He works on everything the staff dishes to him plus projects of his own. So make sure you visit DBGT often for his updates.
